stories.title: Predicting how all 48 teams will do in the World C...
stories.summary: Who will win the FIFA World Cup? Instead of predicting a final winner, we've picked every single result to show HOW our predicted winner will do it.

stories.title: Betting preview: One bet to make on every team
stories.summary: With so many potential bets, it might be overwhelming to know where to begin. We can help.

stories.title: Broncos LB Cooper accused of domestic violence
stories.summary: Broncos outside linebacker Jonathon Cooper has been arrested on suspicion of criminal mischief with a domestic violence enhancer.

stories.title: Bears edge closer to move to Northwest Indiana
stories.summary: The Bears took a significant step toward leaving Chicago on Friday after the team's board of directors voted Thursday to advance their stadium development plans in nearby Hammond, Indiana.

stories.title: Bucs' Mayfield: Contract talks 'not anywhere close...
stories.summary: Speaking publicly for the first time this offseason, Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield said that contract extension talks "are not anywhere close to what we were thinking" and that it's "time to get something done long-term."
